unit_tests.note: 1 pre-existing intermittent failure in git-utils.test.ts (not related to this change)

commits: d6d3b9d: fix(sync): clean up tmux sessions when worktrees are deleted during sync

implementation_summary.task_1_1: SyncResult type added to worktrees.ts, syncWorktreesToDB() returns { deletedIds, upsertedCount }
implementation_summary.task_1_2: killWorktreeSession() common function added to session-cleanup.ts with try-catch pattern
implementation_summary.task_1_3: syncWorktreesAndCleanup() helper added to session-cleanup.ts with SEC-MF-001 sanitization
implementation_summary.task_2_4: clone-manager.ts updated to use syncWorktreesAndCleanup() with IA-MF-002 error handling
implementation_summary.task_2_5: server.ts updated: excludedPaths with cleanup->delete order (SF-002), sync with helper (MF-001)
implementation_summary.task_2_6: repositories/route.ts local killWorktreeSession() replaced with common import

message: TDD implementation complete. All 9 acceptance criteria addressed. syncWorktreesToDB() returns SyncResult with deletedIds. killWorktreeSession() and syncWorktreesAndCleanup() added as common functions. All call sites updated. Parallel cleanup with Promise.allSettled(). Cleanup warnings sanitized per SEC-MF-001.
